title: Prevent zip slip vulnerabilities
description: Extracting archives without proper path validation can lead to zip slip vulnerabilities where attackers can write files outside the intended directory. This can overwrite system files or place malicious files in sensitive locations.
recommendation: Validate and sanitize file paths during archive extraction to prevent directory traversal attacks.

noncompliant.description: Extracting archives without proper path validation allows zip slip attacks where malicious files can be written outside the intended directory.

compliant.description: Validating file paths, checking for directory traversal, and implementing security controls prevents zip slip vulnerabilities during archive extraction.

checks.message: Zip slip vulnerability detected. File path from archive used without proper validation - may allow directory traversal attacks.
